title: krokia leonis
intro: Krokia leonis, also known as the lion's tail, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Krokia leonis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a variety of ailments.
